Event types: Trial Sentencing Preliminary Hearing Arraignment VOP Motion Plea Other
What counts as "Newsworthy": Preliminary Hearings, Trials (Jury & Waiver), Sentencings, Penalty Phase Hearings, JLSWOP Resentencings, Arraignment Preliminary Hearings, and Status Hearings. These are the event types most likely to produce public developments in a case. The "All Events" tab includes everything — motions, continuances, VOP hearings, etc.
